account.name: Mem0
account.summary:
The Memory layer for your AI apps

Mem0 provides a memory layer for LLM applications, enabling them to remember and learn from user interactions over time.


YC batch: Summer 2024

Location: San Francisco, CA, USA

Company website: https://mem0.ai

strengths: The strongest wedge for early users is that it fits into an existing stack in three calls, works with any LLM, and avoids a rewrite.
The product goes beyond vector search with a richer memory model, MCP surface, and Oracle tree search for deeper agent workflows.
weaknesses: RetainDB intentionally does not position around recalling assistant-generated content, so that should not be the lead pitch.
